name: Frost FX Bar RGBW
comment:
Eliminator Lighting Frost FX Bar RGBW: 
The Eliminator Lighting Frost FX BAR RGBW is a 1-meter LED linear wash fixture that chases colors and creates breathtaking effects. Includes 14x 3W RGBW LEDs for beam effects + 84x 5050 RGB (3-IN-1) SMD LEDs for glowing effect. Use horizontally or vertically for unique effects for stages, bars, lounges, clubs, bands and mobile entertainers.

capabilities.comment: Rnd Strobe Slow to Fast Bkgrnd
